---
title: 'Tail Latency in Node.js: Energy Efficient Turbo Boosting for Long Latency
  Requests in Event-Driven Web Services'
author:
- Wenzhi Cui
- Daniel Richins
- Yuhao Zhu
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/vee19.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/tail-latency-in-node-dot-js-energy-efficient-turbo-boosting-for-long-latency-requests-in-event-driven-web-services
journ: VEE
year: 2019
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 25
---
